subject: We’re almost live…
body:
The stream is up & live now. So you can hop on the livestream early here >> live.acq.com

Festivities begin - at 9am PT / 12pm ET.

This is going to be INSANE.

Alex

PS - Last chance to get VIP by preordering a single book. If you plan on getting a book, there's zero logical reason to not get more free stuff for the same price (and get them faster).
